description: AI-powered market analysis, trade idea generation, and execution planning for institutional trading desks

agents.name: Market Analyst
agents.description: Monitors real-time market conditions, analyzes price action, volatility regimes, and macro catalysts to assess current trading environment

agents.name: Trade Idea Generator
agents.description: Generates actionable trade ideas with entry/exit levels, risk-reward profiles, and conviction scores based on multi-factor analysis

agents.name: Execution Planner
agents.description: Designs optimal execution strategies including timing, sizing, venue selection, and slippage minimization for proposed trades
